playbook.intent: Open usability question on a feature -> severity-ranked findings + scoped fixes + follow-up plan.
playbook.scope: Designer runs one usability cycle across 3 weeks. Includes script + recruit, moderated + unmoderated sessions (5-6 each), AI-assisted analysis, severity-ranked findings, and a scoped fix list with follow-up plan. Done when fixes are queued with engineering and a follow-up test is planned for the next iteration.

success-criteria.criterion: Critical fixes scoped + queued with engineering

stage.name: Plan
stage.intent: Lock the test plan before recruiting.

tasks.task: Build screener from audience segments + personas

stage.decision-gate: Advance when plan + script are reviewed.

stage.name: Recruit
stage.intent: Recruit the right participants in time.

tasks.task: Launch unmoderated study with 8-10 panel users

stage.decision-gate: Advance when target sample is locked.

stage.name: Moderated sessions
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when sessions are completed.

stage.name: Unmoderated study

tasks.task: Run unmoderated study with timed tasks
Optional A/B on a contested decision

stage.decision-gate: Advance once unmoderated study is complete.

stage.name: AI-assisted analysis
stage.intent: Speed up coding without losing signal.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when severities are validated by a second eye.

stage.name: Scope fixes
stage.intent: Decide what gets fixed now vs later.

tasks.task: Pair with engineering on fix scoping
Queue critical fixes in the backlog

outputs.output: Scoped fix list + parked items log

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when criticals are queued with engineering.

stage.name: Follow-up plan
stage.intent: Close the loop with a next test.
stage.decision-gate: Done when next test is on the calendar.

extra.value: ['Test script too long -> participants fatigue, signal drops', No severity rubric -> all findings feel equally urgent, No follow-up test -> fixes ship blind]
['Did critical findings get into the backlog?', 'Is the next test scheduled?', 'Did stakeholders hear the findings, not just read them?']

{human: faion get-content usability-test-cycle-end-to-end-3-weeks --format md, agent: faion get-content usability-test-cycle-end-to-end-3-weeks --format context, json: faion get-content usability-test-cycle-end-to-end-3-weeks --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
